name: Marcin Panuś
message:
Hi,
I’d like to apply for the Frontend Developer position.
I currently work at Samsung Ads, where I develop frontend solutions using React and TypeScript in a large-scale product environment. My experience includes working with Nx monorepo architecture, reusable UI components, automated testing (Jest, Playwright), and collaboration with cross-functional teams.
Best regards,
Marcin Panuś
